title: pdbethke/corralai

summary: The Python IDE with a drag-and-drop Tkinter GUI Designer — plus LSP diagnostics, debugging, Git, and AI assistance, all built in.

title: phuetz/code-buddy
summary: Open-source multi-provider AI coding agent — terminal + Electron desktop (Cowork) + 24/7 multi-AI fleet, free-first on local Ollama. Opt-in, human-gated evolutionary self-improvement that ingests research to set its own goals. 15 LLM providers (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok), ~110 tools, MCP, voice+vision companion.

title: Martossien/transcria
summary: Self-hosted meeting transcription portal — speech-to-text, speaker diarization, LLM-corrected transcripts, structured summaries and Word minutes, on your own GPUs. Flask + PostgreSQL, GDPR audit trail, distributed GPU topologies, docker

title: ENTERPILOT/GoModel
summary: AI gateway written in Go. Lightweight unified OpenAI-compatible API for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, xAI & Ollama. LiteLLM alternative with observability, guardrails, streaming, costs and usage tracking.

title: r3dbars/nightshift
summary: Put your idle AI hardware to work while you sleep. Overnight, your machines scan the repo, draft safe work, and hand you a ranked morning brief. Drafts, not deploys. Local-first, MIT.

title: szl-holdings/szl-forge
summary: SZL Forge — train SZL Holdings own sovereign model (SZL-1) on SZL own hardware. QLoRA fine-tune kit: dataset, Unsloth training script, Ollama Modelfile, runbook.
